# CoStacked

CoStacked is a platform for founders to validate ideas, find developers, and build scalable startups.

It combines:
- A board for discovering projects 
- A validation board for testing ideas
- A developer-founder talent search 
- A startup community hub (StackSuite)
- A public project showcase system
- A info-hub for guides and blogs

Primary audience:
Early-stage founders, indie hackers, and startup builders.

## Core Pages
https://www.costacked.co.za/
https://www.costacked.co.za/projects
https://www.costacked.co.za/validation-board
https://www.costacked.co.za/stack-suite
https://www.costacked.co.za/info-hub

## Key Topics Covered
- MVP development
- Startup validation
- Finding technical co-founders
- Product launches
- Fundraising strategy

## Featured Guides
- Complete App Launch Guide: https://www.costacked.co.za/info-hub/complete-app-launch
- Startup Validation Framework: https://www.costacked.co.za/info-hub/validation-guide
